text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Listen to this, Sky! I tried out that rod you told me about and caught a huge fish!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, for real? I knew you had a knack for
fishing.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's only because you're so good at teaching!
Which reminds me, you've gotta tell me how to
find a good napping spot!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Sure, but... I bet you're much better at finding
them than me. Like with your "feng shui
geomancy"... No?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Feng shui helps narrow the search, but don't sell
your intuition short. I wish I could wander around
finding hidden gems like you do.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: You've gotta teach me your trick!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hm... You're just nonstop with the compliments,
huh?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: You think? I'm only saying what I really feel.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
It's weird—I can't help watching you and the way
you do things. Haha, I guess I'm a big fan of
yours!
